note_text: Wound note - Leftheel. Meas 4.7x3.7x2.9cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 69% gran, 31% slough. Periwound erythematous. Collagen dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Ramirez notified.

Pt seen for wound eval. Pressure Ulcer Left heel measures aprx 4.7 x 3.7cm, depth 2.9cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 2.8x2.2, 1.4cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
